description_long: This object is a stylized hot-air balloon with a large, rounded envelope that is predominantly a golden yellow color. The envelope has a faceted, polygonal surface, giving it a geometric appearance rather than a smooth, fabric-like texture. The lower portion of the envelope transitions to a dark gray or black section, which tapers to a point where a basket would typically be attached, though no basket is visible. There are faint, irregular dark markings around the lower circumference of the envelope, suggesting either shadowing or a subtle decorative band. The overall shape is bulbous and symmetrical, with no visible seams, logos, or text. The object appears to be made primarily of lightweight synthetic material, likely nylon or polyester, with an air-filled interior.
description: A faceted, golden yellow hot-air balloon envelope with a dark tapered bottom and subtle dark markings near the base. No basket or visible attachments are present.
description_view_0: The balloon envelope is seen from above, showing its rounded, polygonal top and the transition to a dark base.
description_view_1: This view highlights faint dark markings encircling the lower part of the envelope, with the dark base more prominent.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, but with a slight hint of the dark markings on the left side of the envelope.
description_view_3: The envelope appears mostly uniform golden yellow, with the dark base visible but no distinct markings.
attribute_envelope_pattern: The envelope is a solid golden yellow color with faint, irregular dark markings near the lower circumference. There are no stripes, logos, or other decorative elements.
